## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and data analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Next week's meeting (10/2) canceled due to Nate's travel to Austin](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Daydream content strategy confirmed; potential for programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Post-hog data limitations identified; alternative metrics (click data) to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Content production to increase from 8 to 10-12 articles/week, with potential for further scaling](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates

  - [Jakub: 95% done with moving, catching up on small tasks](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Jessalynn: Solo parenting + dog sitting this week](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [Nate: Traveling to Austin next week (Mon-Thurs) for team office visit](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Content Strategy Confirmation

  - [Focus on Daydream topics (not Wisdom) for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [\~800 potential topic codes identified for Daydream](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Expectation of good SEO results due to low competition](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Initial manual creation to assess content quality and process](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Exploring potential for programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Data Analysis Challenges

  - [Post-hog data limitations: Events lost when redirected to App Store](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Alternative metric: Click data from individual pages to be collected](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Engineer to pull click data as a proxy for conversion](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

### Content Production Scaling

  - [Current: 8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Immediate increase: 10-12 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Long-term potential: Significantly more if programmatic approach viable](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Testing period over next few weeks to determine scalability](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### Operational Considerations

  - [Rachel to closely monitor content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Assessing balance between editorial and programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Potential for separate workflow if truly programmatic generation possible](https://fathom.video/share/-YP5jH9QGbu9VQKyXyqrFwxyaaMKRJCJ?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
